title: Decision of the third meeting of the Commission of Small Island States on Climate Change and International Law, 26 August 2022
text:
Note by the Registry: The original text of the decisions refers to “24 November 2022”. By
communication dated 19 December 2022 from the Representative of the Commission, this
was corrected to read as reference to “24 November 2021”.
court: International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea (ITLOS)
